name: solid-ui-skos
description: SKOS-aware ui:Choice for solid-ui: populate a form dropdown from a skos:ConceptScheme, skos:Collection, or skos:Concept, with transitive scheme/concept enumeration and optional inline concept minting (ui:canMintNew). `import 'solid-ui-skos'` and it auto-registers (resolves rdflib + solid-logic + solid-ui itself).
